name: Novu
description: Novu is a notification infrastructure platform for managing multi-channel notifications. Use this API to trigger notification workflows, manage subscribers and their preferences, organize topics, configure integrations, and track message delivery.

capabilities.name: events_trigger
capabilities.description: Trigger a notification workflow for one or more recipients. Matches the trigger identifier to a configured workflow.

capabilities.name: events_trigger_bulk
capabilities.description: Trigger multiple notification events simultaneously (up to 100 per request).

capabilities.name: events_broadcast
capabilities.description: Broadcast a notification event to all existing subscribers.

capabilities.name: events_cancel
capabilities.description: Cancel an active or pending workflow using a previously generated transactionId.

capabilities.name: subscribers_create
capabilities.description: Create a new subscriber with identification and channel data.

capabilities.name: subscribers_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve a subscriber by their unique ID.

capabilities.name: subscribers_update
capabilities.description: Update an existing subscriber's properties.

capabilities.name: subscribers_delete
capabilities.description: Delete a subscriber and all their data.

capabilities.name: subscribers_preferences_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve notification preferences for a subscriber.

capabilities.name: subscribers_preferences_update
capabilities.description: Update notification preferences for a subscriber.

capabilities.name: topics_create
capabilities.description: Create a new topic for grouping subscribers.

capabilities.name: topics_list
capabilities.description: List all topics with pagination.

capabilities.name: topics_add_subscribers
capabilities.description: Add subscribers to a topic.

capabilities.name: topics_remove_subscribers
capabilities.description: Remove subscribers from a topic.

capabilities.name: workflows_list
capabilities.description: List all notification workflows.

capabilities.name: workflows_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve a specific workflow by ID.

capabilities.name: workflows_create
capabilities.description: Create a new notification workflow.

capabilities.name: workflows_update
capabilities.description: Update an existing workflow.

capabilities.name: workflows_delete
capabilities.description: Delete a workflow.

capabilities.name: messages_list
capabilities.description: List all sent notification messages with filtering.

capabilities.name: messages_delete
capabilities.description: Delete a specific message by ID.

capabilities.name: notifications_list
capabilities.description: List notification events with filtering by channels, templates, and date ranges.

capabilities.name: integrations_list
capabilities.description: List all channel integrations in the organization.

capabilities.name: integrations_create
capabilities.description: Create a new channel integration (email, SMS, push, chat provider).

capabilities.name: environments_list
capabilities.description: List all environments in the organization.
